name: Underworld Ascension Method / Yellow Springs Ascension Art
howLearned: Taught by Situ Nan (the remnant soul inside the Heaven Defying Pearl). The Ancient Underworld Ascension Method was a Ji Realm cultivation method; what Situ Nan transmits is a reorganized version with a slim chance of success.
realmRequired: Foundation Establishment to use safely; cultivates Yin Qi toward Core Formation
effect: Divided into 9 layers. Uses places of extreme Yin as cultivation sites. The cultivator enters a near-death state, absorbs extreme-Yin spiritual power, and forms a **Cold Dan** (cold core) that dramatically boosts the success rate of forming a Golden Core. Also catalyst for reaching the **Ji Realm** (Extreme Realm).
cost: Forces a near-death state during cultivation (body is vulnerable). Requires locating extreme-Yin sites (Yin Energy Detection Technique used to find them — Yin quality graded Ordinary / Good / Dense / Extreme). Side-effect: produces cold-attribute **Blue Flames** (Ch. 121).
evolution: Yields the Cold Dan → Golden Core; cultivates Red Lightning / Ji Realm Divine Sense (Ch. 127). Pairs with Yin Energy Detection Technique. Eventually superseded by Celestial/Ancient Order cultivation but remains the early-game engine of Wang Lin's rise.

name: Vermilion Bird Burning Heaven Art
chapterLearned: implied early; the Vermilion-Bird-lineage core art Situ Nan transmits alongside the Underworld Ascension Method
howLearned: Taught by Situ Nan (2nd-Gen Vermilion Bird lineage)
effect: Foundational Vermilion Bird cultivation art that opens the path to the Vermilion Bird Mark awakenings (1st–4th).
cost: Requires the Vermilion Bird Sequence to fully unlock.
evolution: Feeds into the Vermilion Bird Mark awakenings, Ethereal Fire, and ultimately the Fire Essence / Fire Essence True Body.

name: Nine Cycle Celestial Refining Tactic / Nine Revolutions Refining Immortal Art
howLearned: An imitation of a low-quality celestial spell created by the **All-Seer** — Wang Lin acquires it as part of his Celestial Cultivation induction on Planet Tian Yun (under All-Seer / Tianyunzi). Baidu source lists it as Nine Revolutions Refining Immortal Art taught via Tianyunzi's clone.
realmRequired: Soul Transformation and up (uses immortal/celestial power)
effect: Causes immortal power inside the body to slowly rotate in a peculiar spiral shape before release — equivalent to the power of a Golden Immortal. Can produce up to 9 revolutions. The longer the power is held in the body before release, the greater the output.
cost: Time-delay tradeoff: more revolutions = more power but longer charge time.
evolution: Stacks with Rapid Spell Art for fast spinning; foundational to late-game Empyrean Exalt reproduction via Rapid Spell Technique mass production.

name: Ancient God Tactic
howLearned: Inherited from Tu Si's memory legacy inside the Ancient God's body (the Land of the Ancient God). Essence of the art is one word: **plunder** — plunder everything.
realmRequired: usable from Qi Condensation but true body reconstruction at Ch. 199 (1-Star Ancient God)
effect: Reconstructs the cultivator's body as an Ancient God. Outer-body cultivation track (the main body sinks into the earth to absorb spiritual energy while the Avatar cultivates normally). Allows absorbing spiritual energy, pills, and inheritance fragments as stars.
cost: Forces a hybrid-track existence: main body becomes Ancient God (poor bloodline initially), Avatar becomes the Qi-Cultivator vessel. Hair turns white after absorbing Tu Si's legacy.
evolution: 1-Star (Ch.199) → 2-Star (Ch.285) → 3-Star (Ch.391) → 4-Star (Ch.708 pseudo / 940 official) → 5-Star (Ch.944) → 6-Star (Ch.1160 pseudo) → 7-Star (Ch.1290 pseudo / 1472 / 1538 golden) → 13-Star Ancient Clan (7G/6D) (Ch.1539) → 20-Star (7G/7M/6D) (Ch.1577) → 24-Star (8G/8M/8D) (Ch.1705) → 26-Star (9G/8M/9D) (Ch.1777) → 27-Star (Ch.2003). Reaches Half-Heaven-Trampling (Ch.2062) and Heaven-Trampling (Ch.2087) via this track.

name: Heaven Technique
nameCn: 通天诀 — Ancient God movement-inside-body art
howLearned: Inherited from Tu Si's legacy
effect: Allows Wang Lin to freely travel anywhere inside an Ancient God's body (Tu Si's body) — used during the Restriction Mountain Trial.
cost: Only useful inside Ancient God body.
evolution: Niche; used for the Land of the Ancient God trial.

name: Indestructible Immortal Body / Undying Immortal Body
chapterLearned: implied ~Ch.1509+ (when Lian Daofei forcibly transmits it; Wang Lin's Dao-Ancient bloodline initially rejects it)
howLearned: Transmitted by **Lian Daofei** (madman, brother of Immortal Emperor Lian Daozhen) inside the Nether Beast. Lian Daofei fused his supreme Immortal bloodline into Wang Lin and imparted the art.
effect: Forges an undying physical body; later inspires Wang Lin's self-created **Undying Ancient Finger** (Ch.1639) and **Undying Ancient Body** (Ch.1728).
cost: Initially rejected by Wang Lin's Dao-Ancient bloodline. After awakening, Lian Daofei imparts numerous divine abilities alongside.
evolution: Inspirational source for two of Wang Lin's original spells.

name: Rapid Spell Art
howLearned: Got after killing **Xu Decai** of the Green Devil Continent
effect: Walks an extreme path that lets the caster cast spells at terrifying speed. The key is opening **nine spell veins** in the body, each increasing casting speed greatly. Spell veins are actually a special method that uses sealed time-energy to accelerate casting.
cost: Each spell vein requires sealing a portion of cultivation/energy; extreme path means failure during opening is fatal.
evolution: Becomes the engine of Wang Lin's Void Tribulant breakthrough — combined with mass-produced fused spells, it lets him reproduce the effect of an Empyrean Exalt fusing Dao into their body. Central to his Ch.1907 breakthrough.

name: Dao Fusion
nameCn: 道融 — Dao Spell of Dao Master Blue Dream
howLearned: Taught by / stolen from Dao Master Blue Dream's lineage
effect: Not an attack or defense — a Dao Spell that fuses your spells with your essence in a special way. If learned, lets the user fuse all spells into tens of millions of different ones, or all into one.
cost: Dao Spell — comprehension-gated, not raw power.
evolution: The mechanical basis for Wang Lin's later Essence fusion breakthroughs (combining Fire/Earth/Water etc.).

name: Finger of Death / Extinction Finger
howLearned: Incomplete Low-Quality Celestial Spell taught by **Situ Nan** (per Baidu: comprehended by Situ Nan from an incomplete immortal art). Originally performed with the **Extinction Twin Fingers** treasure; Situ Nan later integrated it with his laws to cast bare-handed.
realmRequired: Foundation Establishment to wield via treasure; bare-hand needs much higher realm
effect: Death-attribute finger strike. Wang Lin's main offensive technique during his Yang-Soul-Transformation period.
cost: Incomplete; backfires if user's realm is too low.
evolution: Has variants Demonic Finger (Ch. 483), Underworld Finger (Ch. 500) — all incomplete celestial spells taught by Situ Nan.

name: Demonic Finger
howLearned: Situ Nan (incomplete low-quality celestial spell, sister-technique to Finger of Death)
effect: Demonic-attribute finger strike; part of Situ Nan's trio of celestial-finger spells (Death/Demonic/Underworld).
cost: Incomplete; limited use per battle.

name: Underworld Finger
howLearned: Situ Nan (third sister-spell to Death/Demonic Fingers)
effect: Underworld-attribute finger strike.
cost: Incomplete; celestial-spell tier.

name: Celestial Slaughter Art
howLearned: Celestial Spell Wang Lin obtained from **Grey-robed All-Seer** (the All-Seer) via Tianyunzi's clone. Baidu: learned from Tianyunzi's clone.
effect: Condenses life force from slaughters into **life seals** that protect the user; won't dissipate unless the last life seal is destroyed.
cost: Initially incomplete — after gathering exactly 10 million life seals, the seals envelop the user into a true-life seal (this is the trap Bei Lou warned Wang Lin about via the Shi Realm).
evolution: Wang Lin discovered Tianyunzi's malicious intent, forcibly expelled it inside a crevice in the Demon Spirit Land, and merged the slaughtering origin into his **first Immortal Guard**. Re-cultivated after wounding Tianyunzi at Qinglin's cave dwelling and obtaining the Slaughter Origin.

name: Heavenly Chop
howLearned: Sword-technique — source not explicit; integrated into Wang Lin's sword dao
effect: A single heavenly chop with the sword; one of Wang Lin's signature sword strikes.
cost: Sword dao — requires a high-quality flying sword.

name: 10 Million Swords
chapterLearned: listed under Sword Divine Abilities, no chapter given
howLearned: Sword-summoning art
effect: Summons ten million sword shadows.

name: Heavenly Chop / 10 Million Swords — note: classified as Sword Divine Abilities alongside Deer (a sword spirit pattern). Wiki groups both as Wang Lin's named sword divine abilities.
Karma Whip
howLearned: With the help of the **Soul Lasher** treasure, Wang Lin tried to understand his Karma Domain — the Soul Lasher was eventually fused with his Karma Dao to become the Karma Whip. (Per items page: Soul Lasher → fused with Karma Dao = Karma Whip.)
effect: Manifests the Karma Domain. Per Baidu: directly attacks the primordial spirit. After being burned by Ghostly Sky Fire and nourished by Wang Lin's concept, it became the Cause-Effect Whip. Has a restraining effect on soul-type entities. Once used to cleave open 7 million worlds with a single whip in the Outer Realm.
cost: Wields karmic backlash if used against those with no karmic link.
evolution: Started as Soul Lasher treasure → fused with Karma Domain → Karma Whip. Later one of Wang Lin's hallmark Origin-sword treasures (Karma Sword) — one of the seven Origin Swords.

name: Mountains Crumble / Mountain Collapse
chapterLearned: Ch. 1105 (4th of Bai Fan's Six Paths Triple Arts)
howLearned: One of the later three Celestial Emperor Bai Fan spells. Baidu: taught by Immortal Lord Qing Shui; one of the Six Paths Triple Techniques.
effect: Summons illusionary volcanoes, fuses them into a real volcano, and crumbles it. Limit: 2 crumbles per volcano, max 6 mountains (Qing Shui's cap). Baidu: fuses immortal power into spiritual sense; the collapse of the mountain is also the collapse of spiritual sense. Materializes a sky-obscuring volcanic peak out of thin air.
cost: Cap of 6 mountains per casting cycle; each volcano only crumbles twice.
evolution: Mountain Crumble triggers Wang Lin's breakthrough to mid Nirvana Cleanser (Ch. 1102) and lets his Karma Domain reach completion; opens path to True-and-False Domain.

name: Falling Star
howLearned: Self-acquired celestial spell (source not detailed)
effect: Summons starlight that swarms the area.

name: Heaven Extinction
howLearned: Self-acquired / blood-absorption technique
effect: Devours the origin souls of all cultivators the user has killed; absorbs their flesh and blood as nutrients to recover.
cost: Karmically heavy — adds to slaughter essence / heart-demon risk.

name: Heaven Reversal Stamp
howLearned: Self-created celestial-spell
effect: Flips the sky to become earth and the sky will become the strongest stamp.

name: Light and Shadow Shield
chapterLearned: Ch. 1321 (Spirit Void Spell — Dao Master Blue Dream's Spells)
howLearned: Dao Master Blue Dream lineage
effect: Creates a light made of every vitality in the world — a defensive shield.

name: Fog Transformation Thunder Spell
howLearned: Self-acquired / lineage
effect: Fog-transformation thunder attack.

name: Giant Thunder Stamp
chapterLearned: Ch. ~1336+ (wiki groups with Fog Transformation Thunder Spell)
howLearned: Self-acquired
effect: Giant thunder-stamp attack.

name: Dao of Power / Rebound Force
howLearned: Black Tortoise method taught by the **2nd Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor** (per Baidu: 2nd-Gen Vermilion Bird passed Dao of Strength as proof)
effect: Rebound force technique — turns opponent's power back on them.

name: Open the Ancient Thunder Realm
howLearned: Stolen / inherited spell of the Scatter Thunder Clan's head elder
effect: Opens the Ancient Thunder Realm.

name: Seven-Colored Lance
howLearned: Taught by a certain **madman** (Lian Daofei); Dao Spell
effect: Seven-colored light contains the power of emotions. When it appears, it can affect the emotions of anyone who sees it. Stronger than Ethereal Fire.

name: Li Guang's Heaven-Shattering Bow Dao
howLearned: Taught by a certain **madman** (Lian Daofei); Dao Spell
effect: Bow-Dao that shatters the heavens; pairs with Li Guang's Arrow.

name: Heavenly Fate Finger
howLearned: Self-realized / derived (Bai Fan-lineage)
effect: Fate-attribute finger strike.

name: Lands Collapse
howLearned: Bai Fan's spell, one of the Six Paths Triple Arts

name: Dark Moon, Clear Skies
nameCn: 暗月晴空 — Bai Fan Spell
howLearned: Bai Fan's spell

name: Undying Ancient Finger
howLearned: Self-created. The Ancient Undying Finger condenses the power of the three ancient clans (God/Devil/Demon) into one finger. Uses **Undying Immortal Body** as the inspiration.
effect: Possesses terrifying offensive power AND terrifying recovery ability.
evolution: Has a body-wide variant: **Undying Ancient Body** (Ch. 1728).

name: Undying Ancient Body
howLearned: Self-created; akin to Undying Ancient Finger but on the scale of his entire body
effect: Whole-body undying state.

name: Heart-Pounding Thunder
howLearned: Comprehended in the last layer of the Ancient Graveyard by fusing the spell with his fire and thunder essence power.
effect: Heart-attribute thunder attack fusing fire & thunder essence.

name: Soul Eye Dao
howLearned: **Great Soul Sect** divination spell — half of the Mourning Death Clan's Dao divination spell
effect: Soul-eye divination and attack.

name: Soul Fantasy Origin
howLearned: Great Soul Sect's spell — summons first Ancestor power

name: Multi-Layered Illusion Spell
howLearned: Great Soul Sect main spell, has nine levels
effect: Nine-layer illusion.

name: Extreme Fire Dao
chapterLearned: Ch. 1826 (Imitated when trying to devour Green Bull's main fire vein; fully comprehended after passing 11th floor of Empyrean Trial)
howLearned: Self-comprehended via Empyrean Trial
effect: One of the **Eight Extreme Daos** Wang Lin self-comprehends.
evolution: Part of a set with Extreme Water (Ch. 1958), Extreme Metal (Ch. 2034), Extreme Wood, Extreme Earth, Extreme Life/Death, and the last three (Extreme Land / Extreme Sky / Extreme Life Dao, Ch. 2063).

name: Extreme Water Dao
chapterLearned: Ch. 1958 — comprehended after passing 12th floor of Empyrean Trial
howLearned: Self-comprehended via Empyrean Trial

name: Extreme Metal Dao
howLearned: Self-comprehended

name: Extreme Wood Dao
howLearned: Self-comprehended

name: Extreme Earth Dao
howLearned: Self-comprehended

name: Extreme Life and Death Dao
howLearned: Self-comprehended

name: Extreme Land Dao
chapterLearned: Ch. 2063 — first of his self-comprehended last three Eight Extreme Daos, on the 5th Heaven-Trampling bridge
howLearned: Self-comprehended

name: Extreme Sky Dao
chapterLearned: Ch. 2063 — second of his self-comprehended last three Eight Extreme Daos
howLearned: Self-comprehended

name: Extreme Life Dao
chapterLearned: Ch. 2063 — final of the last three Eight Extreme Daos; can also be translated as Extreme Fate Dao or Extreme Command Dao
howLearned: Self-comprehended

name: One Step To Trample the Heavens
chapterLearned: Ch. 2064 — Heaven-Trampling Dao, comprehended on the 5th bridge
howLearned: Self-comprehended
effect: Single step that tramples the heavens; the Dao of the 4th Step.

name: Ancient Ancestor's Finger Attack
howLearned: Ancient Order lineage

name: God, Demon, Devil, Ancient Dao, No Celestial!
howLearned: Self-realized; requires three spells in order before execution: **God Tremble, Army Formation** → **Demon Spell, The Fiery Wind Turns Into a Mountain** → **Devil Dao, Life and Death Reversal**
effect: Combined three-ancestor attack — only then can this spell be executed.

name: God Punch
howLearned: Ancient Order spell

name: Life Exchange
howLearned: Ancient Order spell
effect: Exchanges life force for temporary burst of power.
cost: Sacrifices lifespan/health.

name: Immortal Dream
howLearned: A fusion of **Dream of Ancient Times** and Wang Lin's own Dream Dao spell. He studied Dream of Ancient Times (shield-owner's technique) but it had limitations — only the owner's memories as a dream to kill. Wang Lin became the master of the shield and his thoughts could change everything about the dream.
effect: Master of the dream — can change everything in the dream to kill.

name: Heaven-Ripping
howLearned: Ancient Order spell

name: Tu Si's Trident / Ancient God's Weapon
howLearned: Inherited from Tu Si
effect: Tu Si's trident; could absorb spells. Wang Lin later obtains it via items page (Ch.1082 — destroyed by Daoist Water Ch.1277).

name: God Slaying Spear (诛神矛) / God Slaying Seal
howLearned: Origin Ancient God spell — borrows power from the ancestors; only the royal clan (Cave World) can use.

name: Heavenly Devil Sound
chapterLearned: Ch. 619 (per techniques page; Situ Nan baidu says Ch. 625)
howLearned: A spell Wang Lin learned from a Scattered Devil's armor he got in Qing Lin's Cave
effect: Devil-sound attack.

name: Spirit Transformation
howLearned: Ancient Order spell
effect: To enter a planet NOT to absorb spiritual energy but to surround oneself in spiritual energy and enter a dormant state. Unless one encounters another Ancient God, no one else can detect it.

name: Merit Spirit
howLearned: Ancient God spell — "Steal the merit of the heavens, take the soul of the universe, gather the Ancient Order, eternal remembrance!"
effect: The universe doesn't have a soul, but this Ancient God spell can withdraw a will from it. If a 9-star Ancient God uses Merit Spirit, they can extract not only the soul of the universe but also some of the laws of the world and use them to change the heavens.
cost: Output scales with user's power.

name: 100 Avatars
howLearned: Ancient Order spell
effect: Creates 100 avatars.

name: Void
howLearned: Ancient God inheritance

name: Mysterious God Star
howLearned: Ancient Order spell

name: God Tremble, Army Formation
howLearned: Ancient Order spell
effect: Army-formation attack spell. (Part 1 of the three-spell combo required for "God, Demon, Devil, Ancient Dao, No Celestial!")

name: Demon Spell, Wind and Fire Mountain
howLearned: Ancient Order spell
effect: Conjures wind-fire mountain demon-spell. (Part 2 of the three-spell combo.)

name: Devil Dao, Life and Death Reverse
howLearned: Ancient Order spell
effect: Reverses life and death. (Part 3 of the three-spell combo.)

name: Ancient Order, Life Transformation Spell
howLearned: Ancient Order spell — rumored ancestors could only use three times in their lives
effect: Transforms life states.
cost: Ancestors could only use 3 times per lifetime.

name: Burning Realm Ancient Umbrella
howLearned: Vermilion Bird Divine Ability — later upgraded
effect: Burning realm umbrella — defensive + offensive domain item.
evolution: Dao Spell version at Ch. 1543.

name: Heavenly Chop (天斩) — note: chapter Ch. 685; sword divine ability. See entry above.
Third Eye Spell
chapterLearned: Ch. 734 — "Spell with a Hint of the 3rd Step"
howLearned: Per Baidu: obtained through an exchange with the ancestor of a clan from the Luotian Star Domain. Contains origin power; further evolved by absorbing origin power during the 3rd trial ("Heaven's Trial") of the Seal Immortal competition.
effect: Origin-power third-eye attack.

name: Body Fixation Art
howLearned: Immortal Art passed down from the Xiangang Continent, left by **Immortal Emperor Qing Lin** for his daughter Qing Shuang; accidentally obtained by Wang Lin. Those who know it: Immortal Emperor Qing Lin, Qing Shuang, the Seal Sovereign, Shui Daozi, and Wang Lin.
realmRequired: Late 3rd Step; one of the few Divine Abilities belonging to the scope of the 4th Step.
effect: Immobilizes a person's body — though the immobilized person can still think. Can fix the body, the soul, immortals, primordial force, the operation of heaven and earth, the flow of stars and rivers, the passage of time, and changes in space.
cost: Related to the laws of heaven and earth; high comprehension cost.

name: Slash Luo Art
howLearned: Legacy sword technique contained within the previous generation's Rain Immortal Sword, Jufu.
effect: Can slash through space and cut through rules. A sword style that destroys rules — astonishing power.

name: Great Teleportation Forbidden Technique
howLearned: Self-developed teleportation-restriction combo (see Movement Techniques).
effect: Uses the momentary time difference during teleportation. The user first seals themselves with a forbidden technique, then continuously uses teleportation within that instant. When strange power is generated, the seal is released, multiplying the teleportation distance by countless times.

name: Ancient God's Blood
howLearned: Obtained by killing the Giant Demon Ancestor. By fusing with the Ancient God's Blood, his true body can manifest a gigantic Ancient God phantom.
effect: Single strike with considerable attack power. (No longer usable later since his true body rarely appears.)

name: Dao Transformation Yellow Springs
chapterLearned: implicit (Baidu) — main divine ability during Wang Lin's Soul Formation period
howLearned: Self-created; materialized product of Wang Lin's Dao thoughts.
effect: Cultivated to its extreme, can form an independent cycle of reincarnation.
evolution: Direct precursor to the **18 Layers of Hell Reincarnation Realm** (Ch. 915).

name: Yellow Springs Finger
howLearned: Situ Nan lineage — used by Situ Nan to heavily injure Tuo Sen.

name: Three Life Spell
howLearned: Self-acquired (great-soul-sect lineage?)
effect: Splits soul, origin soul, and body into three parts.

name: Heaven Technique
nameCn: 通天 — distinct from the Ancient God Heaven Technique

name: Ji Realm / Extreme Realm Divine Sense (极境神识) — aka "Red Lightning"
chapterLearned: Ch. 127 (after Foundation Establishment Early Stage, when Wang Lin's spiritual energy ascends to Ji Realm; the Ji Realm changes from Spiritual Energy to Divine Sense)
howLearned: Awakened through the trauma of the Wang Clan's annihilation + the Underworld Ascension Method's catalyst. The "Extreme Realm" is a unique cultivator-state where Spiritual Energy refines into Divine Sense.
realmRequired: Foundation Establishment → continues to evolve; remains a hallmark through Soul Formation
effect: A killing divine sense that lets Wang Lin kill any cultivator below Core Formation at FE stage, below Nascent Soul at Core Formation, below Soul Formation at Nascent Soul Peak. Qing Shui used the Ji Realm to kill Russell for offending Wang Lin.
cost: **The Ji Realm curse:** originally a Ji-Realm method of the Underworld Ascension Method. The Ji Realm interferes with Wang Lin's breakthroughs — at Nascent Soul the conflict with the Avatar temporarily removes the drawback. Repeatedly sealed and unsealed across the story. Eventually absorbed into Slaughter and into **Ji Thunder** (Ch. 1368 — one of his 9 accompanying thunders).
evolution: Spiritual Energy → Divine Sense (Ch.127) → conflicts with Nascent Soul breakthrough (solved via Avatar) → sealed during Soul Formation → returns as Ji Thunder (Ch.1368, the 7th accompanying thunder).

name: Soul Piercing Eyes / Divine Sense Eyes
howLearned: Divine sense eyes that are only obtained once someone has reached a certain level of mastery in restrictions
effect: Pierces illusions and restrictions; reads structure of restrictions.

name: Heart of Slaughter
howLearned: Awakened through accumulated slaughter
effect: A heart-state that channels slaughter intent.

name: Heart Restriction
howLearned: Wang Lin's specialized restriction — paired with Heart Compass (item) and the Restriction Heart inheritance
effect: Restricts the heart/mind; works on the inner demons of self and enemies.

name: Eyes Suppressing the World
howLearned: From the fragment of the sword the **green-robed old man (Ji Si)** had fused into his eyes. Per Baidu: Ji Si implanted a fragment of the Celestial Ancestor's Immortal Absolute Sword into Wang Lin's eyes so his gaze can suppress another cultivator.
effect: His gaze can suppress another cultivator. Per Baidu: directly tied to Metal Essence — third fragment of the Celestial Ancestor's Sword.
evolution: Tied to Metal Essence completion (Ch. 1997).

name: Samsara Eye / Reincarnation Eye
howLearned: Situ Nan's technique — Wang Lin learns it second-hand
effect: Can briefly glimpse karma lines.

name: Heavenly Eye
howLearned: Situ Nan awakened it after reincarnation
effect: Sees through cultivator disguises.

name: Blue Flames
howLearned: Cold-attribute flame from the Underworld Ascension Method

name: Star Rotation
howLearned: Self-acquired technique
effect: Defensive rotation technique.

name: Spatial Bending
howLearned: Self-acquired movement/divine-sense

name: Planet Soul Extraction
howLearned: Self-acquired soul-technique

name: God Speed Divine Arts
chapterLearned: listed under Techniques; no chapter given
howLearned: Self-acquired

name: Ji Realm
nameCn: 极境 — also listed as Technique, distinct from the Divine Sense form
chapterLearned: Ch. 1306 (listed as a Technique alongside Spatial Bending, Planet Soul Extraction, God Speed)
howLearned: Refinement of Ji Realm into a usable technique after the Ascendant breakthrough

name: Ancient Restrictions
chapterLearned: Ch. ~S1 EP31 (around Ch.179-180) — studying for a total of **seven years** in the Land of the Ancient God Restrictions Mountain Trial
howLearned: Self-taught via the trial; Wang Lin spent 7 years studying
effect: Foundation for all his restriction work.

name: Restriction Flags Refining Method
chapterLearned: Ch. ~S1 EP32 (around Ch.180) — Wang Lin becomes the 4th person to successfully comprehend the trial; Tu Si then gave the refining method
howLearned: Inherited from Tu Si after passing the trial
effect: Explains the flag material made with inkstones; put 99,999 restrictions to complete it. Each Restriction Flag is a portable formation-array.
cost: Requires 3 Ink Stones per flag; 99,999 restrictions must be woven.
evolution: Wang Lin made three flags: (1) intentionally left incomplete to summon divine tribulation, (2) mixed restrictions, (3) pure attack restriction flag.

name: Illusionary Circle
howLearned: Self-developed — after 7 years of research and improvement, he had mastered this technique. He didn't even need to look with his eyes; by examining the wave produced by the illusionary circle, he could understand the structure and rules of any restriction.
effect: Wave-based restriction analysis tool — lets Wang Lin "read" any restriction's structure and rules without seeing it.

name: 18 Plum Restriction / Plum Blossom Eighteen Restriction
howLearned: Self-derived from the Annihilation Restriction (one of the four great restrictions)
effect: Per Baidu: Mysterious restriction art derived from the ancient Destruction Restriction. Unpredictable, almost supernatural. Once set, operates autonomously. Form resembles a blooming plum blossom. The 18 sets of restrictions transform into statues.
evolution: Derived from Annihilation Restriction → can be deployed as a treasure/compass (Heart Compass).

name: Annihilation Restriction (寂灭禁) — 1st of the Four Great Restrictions
howLearned: Obtained after inheriting half of restrictions heart from **Li Yuan**
effect: One of the four great restrictions. Annihilation-attribute; destroy-the-target restriction.
evolution: Source of the 18 Plum Restriction. Combined with Heart Compass for full activation.

name: Nine Deaths Perish Formation
howLearned: Self-constructed formation from Annihilation-lineage restrictions

name: Time Restriction (时禁) — 2nd of the Four Great Restrictions
howLearned: Self-comprehended / inherited; one of the four great restrictions
effect: Time-bending restriction.

name: Life and Death Restriction (生死禁) — 3rd of the Four Great Restrictions
howLearned: Self-comprehended / inherited; one of the four great restrictions

name: Ancient Soul Restriction (古魂禁) — 4th of the Four Great Restrictions
howLearned: Self-comprehended / inherited

name: Heart Restriction (心禁) — also listed in C
howLearned: Restriction-heart inheritance (paired with Heart Compass item)
effect: Pairs with Heart Compass and Restriction Heart inheritance.

name: Destruction Restriction
howLearned: One of the four great ancient forbidden arts — the pinnacle of ancient restriction arts. To fully unleash the power, must be combined with the **Heart Restriction Compass** and the legacy of the **Destruction Heart Restriction**.
effect: Once mastered to great completion, can travel the world using restrictions, sealing everything from immortals and demons above to mortal beasts below; all things in the world can be sealed.

additionalFields.Note: Per Baidu, this is the capstone of ancient restriction arts and the source-derivation of the 18 Plum Restriction. Whether this is identical to the Annihilation Restriction or a 5th capstone is ambiguous — wiki groups them as Four Great Restrictions (Annihilation/Time/Life-Death/Ancient-Soul) and Baidu adds Destruction as the peak ancient forbidden art. Likely: Destruction is the overarching source-art, of which Annihilation is one branch.

name: Restriction Essence
howLearned: Self-forged Essence — Wang Lin finally mastered it by merging the laws of the world and millions of fused formations from the Immortal Astral Continent into the bloodlines of his eyes, which he gained from the Great Soul Sect's Ghostly Sail.
effect: After a lifetime of studying Restrictions and acquiring all of the Four Great Restrictions (Annihilation, Life and Death, Time, and Ancient Soul) to step into Abstract Realm, Wang Lin forms this Essence.
evolution: Restriction Essence True Body (Ch. 2044 initial, 2046 completed). Fused into Slaughter Thunder Essence True Body (Ch. 1900+).

name: Unnamed Wheel Formation
howLearned: Self-created — an upgraded version of his Life-Death, Karma, True-False Wheel Formation. Put up in place of the Realm-Sealing Formation.
effect: Functions as a seal that stops all Outer Realm cultivators from entering the Inner Realm, while NOT restricting the entrance of Joss Flames into the Inner Realm (the Realm-Sealing Formation's biggest flaw). Four-part creation: 1. Calls treasure spirits of all treasures destroyed in the past 100 years of war to fuse with the formation and become eternal. 2. Calls souls of all cultivation planets destroyed in the past 100 years of war to fuse with the formation and become eternal. 3. Gathers soul fragments of countless Outer Realm cultivators who died in the Inner Realm and forces them to become slaves that push the wheel forever. 4. Beseeches resting souls of all Inner Realm cultivators who died in previous and current wars to become the formation's immortal formation spirit, worshipped by generations of Inner Realm cultivators.

name: Blood Lines Rules
howLearned: Self-comprehended restriction-essence rule

name: Soul Searching
howLearned: Self-taught
effect: Rips memories from a captured soul.

name: Soul Flag Production Method
howLearned: Main cultivation method of the Soul Refining Sect — splits into three parts: **Soul Refining, Soul Extracting, and Soul Sealing**.
effect: Lets the user refine souls into a Soul Flag. Powers the One Billion Soul Banner.
evolution: Wang Lin inherits the One Billion Soul Banner from Dun Tian and uses this method to repair it.

name: Soul Refining
chapterLearned: Ch. 384 (part of Soul Flag Production Method)
howLearned: Soul Refining Sect method

name: Soul Extracting
howLearned: Soul Refining Sect method

name: Soul Sealing
howLearned: Soul Refining Sect method

name: Soul-Devourer Soul Nature
howLearned: Innate soul-nature — Wang Lin's Soul contains the Soul-Devourer nature. Manifests as a **Soul Gem**.
effect: Soul-devourer with a soul gem could create wandering souls.
evolution: Soul Gem (Ch. 193) → devours Ancient Thunder Dragon (Greed's Second Origin Soul) at Ch. 650 → absorbs Heavenly Flame (Ch. 1021) → fuses with Devilish Flames, Fire Dragon, and Flame Dragon (Ch. 1068) → obtains Soul Blood from Ancient Race Heavenly Blood Calamity, transforming his soul into an Ancient Order Soul close to the Ancient Ancestor — considered the Ancient Ancestor's Fourth Child.

name: Soul Branding (灵魂烙印) / Slave Seal
chapterLearned: early; used on Big Head Cultivator and others
howLearned: Self-acquired

name: Magic Arsenal (魔库术) — soul-binding celestial spell
chapterLearned: Ch. 919 (3rd of Bai Fan's Six Paths Triple Arts)
howLearned: Bai Fan lineage
effect: Spell that stores all souls of enemies the user has killed through their lifetime. Wang Lin used his Life and Death domain Underworld River as a catalyst to bind the souls into Celestial Sealing Stamp to form **18 Layers of Hell Reincarnation Realm**.
evolution: Combined with Underworld River (Ch. 604) + Celestial Sealing Stamp → 18 Layers of Hell Reincarnation Realm (Ch. 915).

name: 18 Layers of Hell Reincarnation Realm
howLearned: Self-created composite — uses **Life and Death Dao Underworld River** + **Celestial Sealing Stamp** to form his own reincarnation cycle.
effect: Forms Wang Lin's own private reincarnation cycle.

name: Nether Guide
howLearned: Spell taught by **Qing Shui** (Wang Lin's senior brother). Condenses all memories of the persons the user killed recently to open a portal that leads to where those persons had ever been before.

name: Heaven Avoiding Coffin (避天棺) — soul-preservation treasure
howLearned: Acquired to preserve Li Muwan's soul
effect: Coffin that preserves a dissipating nascent soul — fills with a mysterious force that surrounds the entire coffin; sustains the soul with the trace of life force inside.

name: Qi Xi Spell (乞夕术) — life-force exchange resurrection
chapterLearned: implicit (Baidu) — Zhan Li Yunzi referred Wang Lin to his ancestor who could use the Qi Xi spell to revive Li Muwan
howLearned: Learned from Zhan Li Yunzi's ancestor
effect: Wang Lin used it on himself, sacrificing his vitality (lifespan) to resurrect Li Muwan and form flesh out of her Nascent Soul.
cost: Ancestor demanded 50% of Wang Lin's life force. Failed to fully recover Li Muwan — didn't pass the 4th day out of 7.

name: Soul Devil Ship
howLearned: Self-forged — a ship made up of the **four great restrictions** and many other restrictions
effect: Composite soul-restriction vehicle/weapon.

name: Heavenly Flame (天火) — Soul-devourer absorbed flame
howLearned: Absorbed a bit of the Burn the Heavens spell (Ming Hai's)
evolution: Part of the Vermilion Bird awakening cycle.

name: Earth Escape Technique
howLearned: Self-acquired basic escape technique

name: Disguising Technique
howLearned: Basic immortal technique
effect: Hides cultivation for a short period, unless the person is already at Foundation Establishment stage.

name: Memory Erasing Technique
howLearned: Self-acquired

name: Attractive Force Technique / Gravitation Art
howLearned: One of the Three Techniques Recorded in the Three Stage of Qi Condensation (most basic immortal techniques, usable at 1st layer Qi Condensation)
effect: Manipulates objects from a distance.

name: Fireball Technique
howLearned: Basic immortal technique (Three Stages of Qi Condensation)

name: Earth Splitting Technique
howLearned: Basic immortal technique (Three Stages of Qi Condensation)

name: Teleportation Restriction (瞬移禁制) — aka Great Teleportation Forbidden Technique
howLearned: Self-created restriction-teleport hybrid
effect: Uses the split second of time distortion that happens when one teleports. First, one seals themselves with this restriction so that in that one instant, they can use teleportation multiple times to produce a mysterious force. Then once the seal is released, all of the force explodes forth and creates a teleportation several times more powerful.

name: Shrink Earth to Inch
howLearned: One of the four great divine abilities that 2nd-step cultivators can comprehend on their own by sensing heaven and earth.
realmRequired: 2nd Step (Cave Mansion Realm); on Xiangang Continent, must reach Golden Venerable level to perform.
effect: Divine ability for traversing and walking between planets. Wang Lin has used it multiple times to distance himself from powerful enemies.

name: Star Compass / Silver Dragon Star Compass
howLearned: Gifted by Giant Demon Clan's Chi Hu; can only be used in the void
effect: Extremely fast void-vehicle — protagonist's primary means of void transportation. Upgraded to Silver Dragon Star Compass at Ch. 477.

name: Flying Sword (飞剑) — base movement
howLearned: Self-acquired

name: Divine Path
howLearned: War God Shrine's Divine Path technique
effect: Allows the cultivator to create an Avatar. The Avatar will help him break through to Nascent Soul Stage.
cost: Only drawback: the Avatar doesn't have cultivation and can only live 30 years.
evolution: Wang Lin breaks the lifespan drawback when he tries to fuse the Avatar back to the Main Body — the Ji Realm conflicts with the Avatar and removes the drawback. No primary or secondary body between the original and the avatar; both are Wang Lin. When they fuse, they become the real Wang Lin. The Avatar cultivates normally while the main body sinks deep into the ground to absorb spiritual energy and make his body stronger (Ancient God outer-cultivation).

name: War God Shrine Refining Technique
howLearned: War God Shrine

name: Devouring Technique / Heaven Devouring Demon Formation
howLearned: Self-acquired vicious formation
effect: Vicious formation called Heaven Devouring Demon Formation. Key ingredients are the bodies of cultivators used as the formation's base. 10 Foundation Establishment cultivators can trap a Core Formation cultivator; 5 Core Formation bodies can kill any mid-stage or lower Core Formation cultivator.
cost: Bodies must be ones Wang Lin personally killed — very inconvenient.

name: Foundation Stealing Technique
howLearned: Self-acquired / Situ Nan
effect: Steals a person's foundation and talent to instantly reach Foundation Establishment. (Used on Teng Li — Ch.86.)

name: Blood Refining Technique
howLearned: Wang Lin creates a Blood Symbol with the help of Situ Nan
effect: Refine treasure faster with a disadvantage: he will get hurt if the treasure is damaged. After the blood symbol appears, place it on the treasure; through repetition the process is complete. Treasure refined with this technique is shrouded with blood aura and gets stronger the more people killed by it.

name: Cultivator Clone / Celestial Body
chapterLearned: Ch. 211 (Fused back with the Main Body when he obtained a strand of hair of the Immortal Ancestor)
howLearned: Divine Path technique — main cultivator avatar

name: Ancient Demon Clone / Avatar
chapterLearned: Ch. 1002 (Fused back with the Main Body to become an Ancient One)
howLearned: Cultivating demonic energy. A statue in the Land of Demonic Spirits; later refined into a Second Avatar. Per baidu: from a statue in Land of Demonic Spirits.

name: Ancient Devil Clone / Avatar
chapterLearned: Ch. ~Ch.1539 (fused back with Main Body to become an Ancient One)
howLearned: Cultivating devilish energy. From the corpse of Daogu Yemo's tomb (Baidu). Per cult page: Third Avatar from 3000 Ancient Devil Souls from the Devil Soul Bottle, half-finished; later infused into body of Ancient Devil Corpse with Royal Aura to complete it.

name: Otherworldly Void Avatar
howLearned: Per Baidu: possesses the same Void Destiny as the Immortal Ancestor and Ancient Ancestor. Condensed at the arc-shaped platform — caused the nine suns of Xiangang to appear simultaneously.
effect: Possesses special powers; completely fused during his battle with the Ancient Path, where he gained enlightenment about his own path.

name: Slaughter True Body / Slaughter Clone — Lu Mo
howLearned: Formed accidentally by fusing the Thunder True Body with Slaughter and Restriction Essences. The body calls himself **"Slaughter"** — he represents Wang Lin's lifetime of murder and was given a black appearance.
effect: Black-haired Wang Lin with weak cultivation level but combat power that can threaten Grand Empyreans. He was given independence and sent back in time by Wang Lin (using Flowing Moon) to find a method to resurrect Li Muwan. Per Baidu clones page: Lu Mo (Lu) — formed by fusion of Killing Origin and Silent Extinction Origin (戮 + 寂灭). Power even surpasses the main body.
cost: Struggles to escape Wang Lin's control. After Li Muwan's resurrection, Slaughter cancelled his own intelligence and merged back with Wang Lin.
evolution: After completion, fused with all other True Bodies → Punishment Slaughter.

name: Five Elements True Body
howLearned: Self-forged by fusing Fire, Earth, and Water Essence True Bodies (Ch.1900), then completing with Metal and Wood.
effect: Represents Wang Lin's lifetime of cultivation. Per Baidu: each of the Five Elements Origins has condensed a true body, and they can also fuse together to form a Five Elements True Body.

name: Slaughter Thunder Essence True Body
howLearned: Formed accidentally by fusing Thunder True Body + Slaughter + Restriction Essences.

name: Restriction Essence True Body
howLearned: Self-forged by splitting Five Elements True Body into five Essence True Bodies and integrating restrictions from Xuan Lou.

name: Absolute Beginning Essence True Body
chapterLearned: implicit (initial) → completed via century of closed-door cultivation with Lou Hou's Spirit
howLearned: Self-forged by simulating day/night alternation using Mourning Death Clan Spell (creates caves), Absolute Beginning Essence as sun, Absolute End Essence as darkness, Grand Empyrean Power to control alternation, Flowing Time Spell to recreate world movement, wisp of Origin Soul to comprehend the process.

name: Absolute End Essence True Body
howLearned: Same simulation process as Absolute Beginning

name: Slaughter Essence True Body
chapterLearned: initial after accidentally creating Slaughter Thunder → completed via century of nourishment and second refining, with Lou Hou's spirit
howLearned: Self-forged — suppressed Slaughter's growth to maintain balance inside Thunder Essence True Body until Absolute Beginning/End Essences learned. Then refined Slaughter Essence a second time to prevent Slaughter rebelling.
evolution: Fuses with all prior Essence True Bodies → **Punishment Slaughter**.

name: Fire Essence True Body
howLearned: After entering the Immortal Astral Continent, Wang Lin realized that his foreign Fire Essence could absorb the Heavenly Bull Continent's Fire Veins. After consuming around 120 Fire Veins and then the Main Fire Vein in the Great Soul Sect, he evolved his Fire Essence's Vermilion Bird manifestation into a Fire Essence True Body.

name: Thunder Essence True Body
howLearned: After being captured as the Green Devil sacrifice, the Dao Devil Sect's Sect Master fed his own Thunder Essence into Wang Lin's to evolve it into his Essence True Body, which he then controlled and used to erase Wang Lin's Mind and Memory without causing great harm to the Soul. However Wang Lin was protected by the Heaven Defying Bead, which allowed him to seize the Essence True Body back after the Devil Dao Sect Master's will was removed.

name: Earth Essence True Body
howLearned: The third grain of sand of the Celestial Ancestors continues to nourish Wang Lin's Earth Essence and turn it into Earth Essence True Body. (Ji Si used three Meng Earth Beads + two of nine grains of sand from the Celestial Ancestor's continent-creation to complete the 9th cycle.)

name: Water Essence True Body
howLearned: With the intent to create the fourth Essence True Body on Wang Lin's body for Green Scorpion to possess, Ji Si used Celestial Sea Mother Soul, Mortal Dream Water, Dao Heart Melting Liquid, Water Celestial Blood Heaven and Earth, and two mouthfuls of blood containing 16 years of his life to turn Water Essence into Water Essence True Body.

name: Wood Essence True Body
howLearned: With pure Wood Essence liquid gifted by Ji Du along with Wood Essence he absorbed while he was with Xuan Lou, the Wood Essence True Body completely formed.

name: Metal Essence True Body
howLearned: To evolve his Metal Essence into Essence True Body, Wang Lin continues the integration of Celestial Ancestor's Sword third fragment along with Metal Essence he absorbs while he was with Xuan Lou.

name: Punishment Slaughter (刑戮) — final fused avatar
howLearned: After the Slaughter Essence True Body formed and struggled to escape Wang Lin's control, Wang Lin fused his Essence True Body with Slaughter starting from Thunder → Restriction → Absolute Beginning and Absolute End simultaneously. Slaughter struggled until Five Elements True Body began pressuring him with divine sense to finally fuse with previous Essence True Bodies, turning Slaughter into **Punishment Slaughter**.

name: Life and Death Domain
howLearned: Cultivated by spending one lifetime's worth of time living as a mortal (Ch.139 mortal-life arc, then a full mortal lifetime in Ch.272 breakthrough). Results in progress through the Nascent Soul Stage and breakthrough to Spirit Formation upon completion.
effect: Manifests as the **Underworld River** (Ch. 604). Controls the cycle of life and death.
evolution: Cultivated via living as a mortal. → Life and Death Essence (Ch. 1280 initial / 1613 completed) → Life and Death Seal (Ch. 1616, Fifth Original Spell). Sacrificed to fuel Fire and Thunder Essences (Ch. 1280). Re-completed later via Dream Dao + Dao Fruits.

name: Karma Domain
howLearned: Evolved from Life and Death Domain after spending another lifetime as a mortal with his son Wang Ping (Ch.701+); later completed.
effect: Manifests as the **Karmic Cycle / Yin-Yang Symbol** (Ch. 850 — left eye containing yang, right eye containing yin). The Karma Whip is its treasure-form.
evolution: → Karma Essence (after sacrificing all six stars against Daoist Water) → Karma Print (Ch. 1614, Fourth Original Spell).

name: True and False Domain / Real and Unreal Domain
howLearned: Evolved from Karma Domain after spending time as a mountain soul while comprehending Bai Fan's Mountain Crumble Spell in Vermillion Bird Divine Sect Starfield.
effect: Controls Real and Unreal. By intoning the **Sundered Night** (Ch. 988), Wang Lin's eyes change: right eye containing lightning and left eye true/false, making others lose control over themselves and their items as they would seem to have entered a state between real and false — a nightmare of hallucinations where they cannot distinguish between real and fake.
evolution: → True and False Essence (after Star of Law destroyed in fight with Daoist Water) → True and False Eternal Seal (Ch. 1617, Sixth Original Spell).

name: Battle Will / Battle Domain
howLearned: Inherited from the golden word **"Battle"** after merging three Zhen Family Battle Scrolls into the word "Battle" and then fusing it with golden light from Zhan Xingye skeletons.

name: Star of Law
howLearned: New law created by fusion of True and False Domain, Fire and Thunder tattoo, and Zhan Family Battle Domain. Per Baidu: Wang Lin's own 7th type of accompanying thunder (also called Store All Ji Thunder at Ch. 1368).
effect: Star-shaped Law Mark; fuses life-death, karma domains, and fire and thunder mark.
evolution: Briefly sealed at Ch.1221 (pseudo Nirvana Shatterer) — could have left him unable to advance. Unsealed at Ch.1298 → Nirvana Shatterer.

name: Sundered Night (残夜) — First Original Spell (Dao of Beginning and End / Creation(or Origin) and Extermination)
howLearned: Self-created — first original spell
effect: When intoning, Wang Lin's eyes change: right eye containing lightning, left eye true/false. Makes others lose control over themselves and their items, hallucinations, can't distinguish real from fake. Controls Real and Unreal.
evolution: In the battle at the Ancient God's Land, used this technique to kill Xu Kongzi and heavily wound Tian Yunzi. Evolved into a **Belief Art** after reaching Kong Jie.

name: Flowing Time (流月) — Second Original Spell
howLearned: Self-created — Dao of Time
effect: Per Baidu: Wang Lin's second self-created divine ability. Comprehended at the gate of the Ancient Immortal Domain in the Wind Immortal World. Can reverse time. Wang Lin used this technique to send his Slaughter true body, Lu Mo, back to the past to search for a method to resurrect Li Muwan.

name: Dream Dao (梦道) — Third Original Spell
howLearned: Self-created — Dao Spell (Dao of Dreams)
effect: Per Baidu: with the help of the Slaughter Clone and three Dao Fruits, lived the life of a mortal scholar, managed to complete his Life and Death, Karma, and True and False Essences. Source for his Dream Dao-derived resurrection method.
evolution: Combined with Dream of Ancient Times → **Immortal Dream** (Ch. 1675).

name: Karma Print (因果印) — Fourth Original Spell
howLearned: Self-created

name: Life and Death Seal (生死印) — Fifth Original Spell
howLearned: Self-created

name: True and False Eternal Seal (真假永恒印) — Sixth Original Spell
howLearned: Self-created

name: Underworld River (黄泉 / 冥河) — Life-Death Domain manifestation
howLearned: Manifestation of Life and Death Domain
effect: Used as catalyst to bind souls into Celestial Sealing Stamp → 18 Layers of Hell Reincarnation Realm.

name: Karmic Cycle / Yin-Yang Symbol
howLearned: Karma Domain manifestation — left eye containing yang, right eye containing yin

name: Void Avatar
howLearned: Per Baidu: possesses the same Void Destiny as the Immortal Ancestor and Ancient Ancestor. Condensed at the arc-shaped platform — caused the nine suns of Xiangang to appear simultaneously.
effect: Possesses special powers; completely fused during his battle with the Ancient Path, where he gained enlightenment about his own path. Fusing with it allows Wang Lin to summon the full **Nine Songs and Three Signs**.

name: Nine Songs and Three Signs
chapterLearned: Ch. 2065 (full summon during Gu Dao battle)
howLearned: Achieved by fusing with the Void Avatar — significantly progresses the fusion of the Celestial and Ancient Powers.
effect: At this point Wang Lin is noted to be a match for the late Celestial and Ancient Ancestors (those who stepped past the Eighth Bridge but not the Ninth). He becomes unrivalled on the Immortal Astral Continent.

name: Reincarnation Essence
howLearned: Wang Lin began to comprehend Reincarnation as his 4th Ethereal Essence after entering the Dong Lin Pool and meditating for a decade. Confirmed his true self by uncovering the secret of the Heaven Defying Bead — finds that the Ji Qiong skull had a divine sense left by Slaughter telling how to revive Li Muwan, and that the Dao Country Imperial Teacher is actually the missing one of the bead (i.e., the Boundary Compass Treasure Spirit).
effect: Completing this Essence = Wang Lin achieves Heaven Trampling the moment he masters it (Ch. 2087).

name: Heaven Trampling (踏天境) — 4th Step
howLearned: Wang Lin achieved Heaven Trampling without stepping on any more bridges. Instead he notes that he reached this level the moment he fully comprehended the Reincarnation Essence.
effect: Per Baidu: through the conflict between soul, divine sense, and Dao charm, can open up a world within the illusory, forming a cycle of reincarnation within this world. The confrontation between these cycles of reincarnation serves as the primary factor determining everything. Those who leap beyond this Dao realm, forging a new path, are the ones who Tread Heaven from the other shore. Walking a single Dao to its end and becoming its source is the Fourth Step.
cost: Realizing the essence of the Fifth Step until accomplishing it is the cultivation of the Fourth Step. Not all Daos allow the prover to become the source — fundamental Daos (Five Elements) cannot be solely controlled; becomes a "pseudo-source" vs "true source" distinction.
evolution: Per Baidu: at the end of ISSTH (Beyond the Transcendence Realm) — can easily shatter a great universe, achieve establishing a Dao with a single word, perceive the existence of the Huangtian Star Ring, and reshape everything except oneself as desired, being referred to as a Paragon. At the end of Three Inches of Paradise (Huangtian Realm) — can break through the Star Ring's obstacles and ascend to Huangtian (corresponds to Immortal Lord Realm of the Huangtian Star Ring).

name: Grand Empyrean Sun (大天尊之阳) — Tricolor
chapterLearned: Ch. 2050 (Grand Empyrean Sun fully condensed) → tricolor black-white-gold
howLearned: Absorbed the head of the Celestial Ancestor, solidifying into a tricolored (black, white, gold) Venerable Sun. Per Baidu: belongs to a special type of Great Heavenly Venerable Sun — three colors: black, white, gold; condensed by his own will, it is the most powerful Great Heavenly Venerable Sun, having fused with quasi-Tread Heaven Realm power.
effect: The energy within the Venerable Sun can be absorbed into the body to enhance strength. Makes him the 10th Sun of the Immortal Astral Continent and second strongest after Gu Dao based on sun size.
evolution: Black-White outline (Ch.1997) → Black-White-Gold fully condensed (Ch.2050) after Lian Daozhan's Soul used as guide.

name: Ethereal Fire
chapterLearned: Ch. 1412 — 4th Vermilion Bird Awakening, 9 colors fused into one
howLearned: 4th Vermilion Bird Awakening
effect: Thanks to the Heaven Defying Bead, his Ethereal Fire is the first and only of its kind to be able to be Cultivated, rather than being limited from the moment of its creation. After 4th awakening, absorbed Nine Tribulation Karma fires, giving him 9 accompanying types of fire for his Fire Essence.

name: Ethereal Essences (虚源) — 4 special Origins
chapterLearned: Ch. 1943+ (Reincarnation), 1950 (Absolute Beginning & Absolute End), implicit (Primordial/Silent Extinction)
howLearned: Per Baidu: 4 virtual origins represent four realms. The special Origins each formed their own true bodies. Killing + Silent Extinction → Lu Mo. Killing + Thunder → Annihilating Thunder.

additionalFields.The 14 Origins total: (Baidu): Metal, Wood, Water, Fire, Earth, Thunder (substantial — 6, each with True Body fusing into Five Elements True Body); Life-Death, Cause-Effect, True-False, Reincarnation (virtual — 4); Primordial/Taichu, Silent Extinction/Miemie, Restriction, Slaughter (special — 4, each with own True Body).

name: Origin Swords
chapterLearned: Ch. 1561+ (Slaughter Sword from Qing Shui), 1625+ (Lightning Sword), and the 5 elemental swords
howLearned: Six fundamental treasures condensed by Wang Lin using the strange power within the vortex formed by the collapse of the void gate.

additionalFields.The set: Fire Origin Sword, Thunder Origin Sword, Cause-Effect Sword, Life-Death Sword, True-False Sword, Slaughter Sword, Restriction Sword (Ch. 1715)

name: Brilliant Void Star System crossing
howLearned: Movement across the Brilliant Void Star System (originally named, later Alliance Star System)

additionalFields.Heaven Defying Bead's role: distorts time 100× inside; allows Wang Lin to compress decades of cultivation into months of real-world time. Original body stuck at 3rd Level appearance; actual cultivation at 14th.

additionalFields.Wang Lin did not endure the Five Heaven': Upon reaching Peak Nirvana Shatterer, he could go beyond and summon the Great Void Gate with a (relatively) complete Essence, although he couldn't open it more than a sliver.

additionalFields.1 Star Ancient God: — Ch. 199 / age ~400. Obtained by default upon reconstruction of body. 200 years inside cocoon.
additionalFields.2 Star Ancient God: — Ch. 285. Absorbing his original body's cultivation (Core Formation) and countless pills.
additionalFields.3 Star Ancient God: — Ch. 391. Absorb a part of the one-billion-soul soul flag.
additionalFields.4 Star Ancient God: — Ch. 708 (Pseudo) / 940 / ~900+. Absorbed spiritual energy of a small planet to attain strength of 4 stars. Absorbed Ji Xiantian's inheritance of power to officially reach 4 stars.
additionalFields.5 Star Ancient God: — Ch. 944 / ~1200. Ancient God Lou Chen gave his remaining two stars to Wang Lin just before he was captured.
additionalFields.6 Star Ancient God: — Ch. 1160 (Pseudo) / 1290 / 1300+. Pass 1st Trial, Bone Calamity and Flesh Calamity at 5 Star, absorb the fog to form a complete Ancient God Body. Attained after absorbing Ancient God energy from the blood sword at the Everlasting sect at the Cloud Sea Star System.
additionalFields.7 Star Ancient God: — Ch. 1290 (Pseudo) / 1472 / 1538 (Golden) / ~2000+. Absorbed inheritance of Ancient Dao Ye Mo. After being given Celestial Blood and the three Celestial Marks of a certain Madman, Wang Lin's Ancient God power fused with Celestial power to create Golden Stars. This fusion was incomplete — only 20% of might usable. That 20% enough to defeat a late stage Nirvana Void Cultivator. Triggered second Trial as an Ancient God and ultimately resulted in his Cultivator Avatar gaining an Immortal Celestial Body.
additionalFields.13 Star Ancient Clan (7 God, 6 Devil): — Ch. 1539. After gaining an Immortal Celestial Body, to combat the 20%-power situation, Wang Lin absorbed the corpse of an Ancient Devil and claimed his stars to complete his Third Avatar. These stars were also turned golden by the Celestial Spirit Energy inside him.
additionalFields.20 Star Ancient Clan (7 God, 7 Demon, 6: — Ch. 1577. After Wang Lin's Second Avatar was complete, he allowed it to absorb the blood of Ye Mo's left eye to skip straight to 7 Stars, then fused together with it, making him a complete Ancient Clansman.
additionalFields.24 Star Ancient Clan (8 God, 8 Demon, 8: — Ch. 1705. After Wang Lin absorbed 8 drops of Ancient Order Ye Mo's essence blood on the Ancient Altar with Ye Mo's right arm, he raised all three of his Ancient Clan bloodlines to eight stars. This triggered his third Ancient God Tribulation and three Calamities, as well as his first and second Tribulations for both his Ancient Devil and Demon powers. After he transcended these Tribulations, Wang Lin attempted the Third Tribulation's First Calamity and offered his blood to the Ancient Clan Ancestor. The Ancestor sent him back 9 drops of blood and 1 drop of soul blood to refine, allowing him to complete his Ancient Clan bloodline to an unprecedented level. (Ch. 1706)
additionalFields.26 Star Ancient Clan (9 God, 8 Demon, 9: — Ch. 1777. Wang Lin obtained Ye Mo's full Inheritance from his Left Arm, Origin Soul Blood, and then his heart to attain 9 Stars in both Ancient God and Ancient Devil powers. After being captured to become the Green Devil's sacrifice, Wang Lin's Ancient Clan body was granted resilience by Ji Si, as this is a trait the Ancient Clan are noted to lack.
additionalFields.27 Star Ancient Clan: — Ch. 2003 (Revealed to have achieved it much sooner). Wang Lin's Ancient Order cultivation was mostly concealed during his time in the Celestial Clan, giving it time to settle and grow to attain the 27th Star by the time he reached the Ancient Clan. Wang Lin soon became able to partially fuse his Celestial and Ancient Cultivations thanks to the pressure of Gu Dao's mountain. After this he passed the Third Tribulation's two last Calamities in the Ancient Shi Branch's Ancestral Temple and achieved an unprecedented perfect result, allowing him to obtain 2 more drops of Soul Blood.
additionalFields.Half Heaven Trampling: — Ch. 2062. Wang Lin crossed the Fourth Heaven Trampling Bridge thanks to his Ancient Cultivation. While fighting Gu Dao, Wang Lin experiences enlightenment and finally fuses with his Void Avatar. This causes the full 9 Songs and 3 Signs to appear and significantly progresses the fusion of his Ancient and Celestial Cultivation into another entirely new power.
additionalFields.Heaven Trampling: — Ch. 2087 (Revealed). Wang Lin achieved Heaven Trampling the moment he mastered the Reincarnation Essence.

name: The Ji Realm Curse and Resolution

additionalFields.Curse origin: The Ji Realm (Extreme Realm) is the result of Wang Lin's clan annihilation trauma combined with the Underworld Ascension Method's catalyst. Spiritual Energy ascends to Ji Realm and refines into Divine Sense (Ch.127, after FE Early). The Ji Realm is originally a Ji-Realm method of the Ancient Underworld Ascension Method.
additionalFields.Conflict: The Ji Realm interferes with breakthroughs — at Nascent Soul it conflicts with the Avatar's formation. The Avatar workaround breaks the lifespan drawback of the Divine Path technique.
additionalFields.Temporary sealing: At Soul Formation Early (Ch.272), Wang Lin abandons his Ji Realm temporarily.
additionalFields.Resolution path: Ji Realm eventually becomes one of Wang Lin's 9 accompanying thunders — the **Ji Thunder** (Ch.1368, 7th accompanying thunder). The 9 accompanying thunders complete his Thunder Essence and allow him to break through to 3rd Step by stacking Essences instead of enduring Heaven's Blights.

additionalFields.Spatial folding: — used by Situ Nan to trap enemies in multi-dimensional space.
additionalFields.Time acceleration: — 100× time flow inside vs outside world. Wang Lin uses it for closed-door cultivation acceleration throughout the early story.
additionalFields.Causality tracing: — Situ Nan uses it to briefly trace back causality (found Tuo Sen's weakness).
additionalFields.Heaven-defying fate-altering: — Situ Nan's Green Soul essence resonates with the bead, enabling heaven-defying fate-altering.
additionalFields.Dream-space: — where Wang Lin's early Qi Condensation acceleration takes place (10.5 months of real time = 13 years of bead time).
additionalFields.Yellow Spring Secret Realm: — Situ Nan opened one inside for Wang Lin's secluded cultivation to break through to Infant Transformation stage.
additionalFields.Body-tempering via heavenly tribulation: — Situ Nan used a projection of the bead to trigger heavenly tribulation, converting it into body-tempering energy.
additionalFields.Soul-protecting: — protected Wang Lin from the Dao Devil Sect Master's Thunder Essence True Body will-erasure (Ch.1892).
additionalFields.Essence cultivation engine: — Ethereal Fire is the first and only of its kind to be Cultivated (rather than fixed) thanks to the bead.
additionalFields.Source recovery: — allowed Wang Lin to restore himself after being absorbed by Sovereign's Seven Colored Flower (Ch.1221).
additionalFields.Sense-spread: — Ch.1040: with the bead's help, Wang Lin's sense spread across the Alliance Star System.
additionalFields.Origin: originates from the Ancient Divine Realm. The original object consisted of 9 parts, with the Heaven Defying Pearl being its most important part. Root cause of the great war in the Ancient Immortal Domain. Bestowed by the Seven-Colored Immortal Venerable to the Realm-Sealing Supreme as proof of authority over the Inner Realm. Main storyline treasure of Renegade Immortal.
